State: This table presents data collected from Title IV institutions in the United States. Prior to 2009-10, the data include only Title IV primarily postsecondary institutions.

1 From 2002-03 through 2008-09 Materials Science was included under Engineering and Neuroscience was included under Multi/interdisciplinary studies. Beginning in 2009-10 Materials Science is included in the Physical sciences and Neuroscience is included with Biology. For more detail on differences between CIP2000 (completion years 2001-02 to 2008-09) and CIP2010 (C2009-10 to the 2018-19) go to https://nces.ed.gov/ipeds/cipcode/crosswalk.aspx?y=55.

SOURCE: U.S. Department of Education, National Center for Education Statistics, Integrated Postsecondary Education Data System (IPEDS), Completions component final data (2001-02 - 2022-23) and provisional data (2023-24).
